overall.description: Vehicle-mounted camera drives along a multi-lane highway toward the entrance of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The scene features prominent overhead power lines, modern industrial architecture on the right, rocky terrain with smokestacks on the left, and a flying vehicle passing overhead in the opening moments.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with industrial buildings and rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the multi-lane highway toward the distant checkpoint structure

entered.detail: multiple high-tension power cables stretching across the sky overhead
large modern industrial building with dark facade and Night City signage
rocky hillside with industrial smokestacks and dry vegetation
futuristic toll booth or checkpoint structure spanning the road ahead
futuristic aerial vehicle hovering in the distance above the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along an open highway toward a futuristic city entrance. Overhead power lines dominate the sky, while a large industrial warehouse stands on the right and rocky terrain with smokestacks occupies the left. A flying vehicle hovers in the distance ahead.

events.description: approaching the covered checkpoint structure, sky becomes partially obscured by canopy
road curves slightly to the right as vehicle nears the checkpoint

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive while navigating the slight right curve toward the covered checkpoint structure

entered.detail: metal roof structure of the toll booth becoming prominent overhead
low concrete barrier along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the covered checkpoint structure, with the industrial warehouse now looming large on the right. The flying vehicle and rocky terrain disappear from view as the road curves slightly right. The checkpoint canopy becomes the dominant feature ahead as the vehicle enters the semi-covered zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an open highway that gradually transitions into a confined urban checkpoint. It begins with a wide view of the road flanked by rocky terrain and smokestacks on the left and a large industrial warehouse on the right, all beneath a sky dominated by overhead power lines. As the vehicle advances, a distant flying vehicle hovers ahead before the road curves slightly right, causing the rocky landscape and aerial craft to fade from view. The scene then shifts as the industrial warehouse looms larger on the right, leading the camera directly toward a massive covered checkpoint structure. Finally, the open horizon disappears as the vehicle enters the semi-covered zone of the canopy.
